display.purpose: Homepage hero heading only — the single largest text on the platform.

label.purpose: Form labels, nav links, card descriptions.

shadows.name: overlay
shadows.purpose: Dialogs, popovers, select content, dropdown menus (apps/admin shadcn primitives) — never on in-flow surfaces like cards or buttons.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Hover/focus color and border-color transitions across buttons, links, cards.

motion.name: ease-nav-reveal
motion.purpose: Logo wordmark reveal and admin-toggle label reveal on hover (max-width + opacity).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one CTA style used across login, register, homepage register-CTA, and apps/admin's default Button variant.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background-color: #0E1C31; color: #ffffff; border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; padding: 8px 16px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: oklch(0.19 0.042 258); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0E1C31; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background-color: #ffffff; color: #171717; border: 1px solid #d4d4d4; border-radius: 0.5rem; padding: 8px 16px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background-color: #fafafa; }

components.name: Destructive Button
components.css: .ds-btn-destructive { background-color: #dc2626; color: #ffffff; border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; padding: 8px 16px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-destructive:hover { background-color: rgb(220 38 38 / 0.9); }

components.name: Nav Pill (inverted)
components.description: The unauthenticated toolbar's "Account aanmaken" link — the system's one deliberate contrast flip (orange fill, navy text, not white).
components.css: .ds-nav-cta { background-color: #F16018; color: #0E1C31; border-radius: 0.375rem; padding: 6px 12px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 150ms ease; } .ds-nav-cta:hover { background-color: oklch(0.58 0.185 42); }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: The one input recipe used identically across login, register, account, and reset-password.
components.css: .ds-label { display: block; font-size: 0.875rem; margin-bottom: 4px; color: #171717; } .ds-input { width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid #d4d4d4; padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 1rem; color: #171717; background: #ffffff; } .ds-input:focus { outline: 2px solid #0E1C31; outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: App Card
components.description: Homepage apps-grid tile. Flat at rest and on hover — hover reads only through a border-color shift, per the Flat-By-Default Rule.
components.html:
Teamplanner

Stel snel en eerlijk teamindelingen samen voor training en wedstrijden.
components.css: .ds-app-card { display: block; border-radius: 0.75rem; border: 1px solid #e5e5e5; background: #ffffff; padding: 20px; text-decoration: none; transition: border-color 150ms ease; } .ds-app-card:hover { border-color: oklch(0.75 0.038 258); } .ds-app-card-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-app-card-icon { width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 0.5rem; background: oklch(0.93 0.018 258); } .ds-app-card-title { font-weight: 500; color: #171717; } .ds-app-card-desc { font-size: 0.875rem; color: #525252; margin: 0; }

components.name: Locked App Card
components.description: "Coming soon" state for capabilities the user (or the platform) hasn't unlocked yet. Dashed border is the system's only vocabulary for unavailability.
components.html:
Statistieken

Wedstrijd- en spelerstatistieken bijhouden. Nog in ontwikkeling.
components.css: .ds-app-card-locked { border-radius: 0.75rem; border: 1px dashed #e5e5e5; background: #fafafa; padding: 20px; } .ds-app-card-icon-locked { width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 0.5rem; background: #f5f5f5; }

components.name: Capability Badge
components.description: Role/capability chip in the admin users table — the only fully pill-shaped element besides the nav pills.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 2px 10px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; background: oklch(0.93 0.018 258); color: oklch(0.15 0.036 258); }

components.name: Platform Nav
components.description: KorfbalToolBar (packages/ui), shared verbatim between apps/main and apps/admin. Pennant-cornered at both top edges; logged-out state shows the login/register pair, the platform's entire reason for existing.
components.html:
Korfbaltools
InloggenAccount aanmaken
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; background: #0E1C31; padding: 12px 24px; } .ds-nav-logo { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: #ffffff; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-actions { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; font-size: 0.875rem; } .ds-nav-link { color: #ffffff; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-link:hover { text-decoration: underline; } .ds-nav-cta { background: #F16018; color: #0E1C31; border-radius: 0.375rem; padding: 6px 12px; text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 150ms ease; } .ds-nav-cta:hover { background: oklch(0.58 0.185 42); }

components.name: Pennant Corner
components.description: The system's signature shape: a small angular flag SVG bracketing the nav bar, footer, and floating admin toggle. Filled with the surface's own background so it reads as a cut corner, not a sticker.

narrative.overview: Korfbaltools.nl is the single voordeur club volunteers walk through before every tool behind it — Teamplanner today, more later. The system reads as a doorway, not a destination: calm, flat, wayfinding-first. Its one recurring signature — the angular pennant corner (NavShape) cut into the nav bar, footer and admin toggle — is the only decorative flourish the system allows itself, and it earns its place by doing a job: marking edges and thresholds, literally shaped like a small flag planted at each corner. Everything else is plain type, flat color fields, and borders instead of shadows. This system explicitly rejects felle sportkleuren, scoreboard-chrome, ad-achtige dichte layouts and uitroeptekens — the korfbal-scoreboard-app cliché PRODUCT.md names directly. It equally rejects generic SaaS landing-page scaffolding: no hero-metric blocks, no fabricated testimonials or 'vertrouwd door X clubs' logo rows, no Notion/Linear-style trendy minimalism standing in for a real identity, and no enterprise-grey forms-on-forms scaffolding.
keyCharacteristics: Flat in-flow surfaces — depth comes from borders and neutral tints, not elevation. The one shadow in the system is reserved for the overlay layer (dialogs, popovers, dropdowns).
One signature shape (the pennant corner) repeated, never new decorative motifs invented per screen.
Deep navy carries structure and authority; orange is reserved for the handful of moments that ask for action.
Dutch, direct, sentence-case copy — no marketing voice, no uppercase eyebrows.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Signaaloranje appears only on elements that trigger an action (register CTA, app-launch pills). It never appears as a background tint, a heading color, or body decoration.

rules.name: The Shared-Family Rule
rules.body: Vaandelmarine's hue (258°) is locked to match apps/teamplanner's own accent color family, so the platform shell and the tool it hosts read as one visual family. Any new app added to the platform inherits this same navy, not a new brand color.

rules.name: The No-Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: No small-caps tracked labels above headings anywhere in the system. Section headings stand alone; hierarchy comes from size and weight, not a kicker line.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: If it stays in the document flow, it has no shadow, including on hover. Shadows are reserved for the one tier of surfaces that leave the flow: dialogs, popovers, selects, dropdown menus.

dos: Do use Vaandelmarine (#0E1C31) as the platform's only structural color — nav, footer, primary buttons, headings.
Do ration Signaaloranje (#F16018) to genuine calls to action only.
Do use the pennant-corner NavShape for any new chrome that needs a corner treatment, instead of inventing a new decorative shape.
Do convey depth with a neutral-border hairline or a paper background shift — never a shadow, unless the surface is a portaled overlay.
Do keep copy in direct Dutch sentence case ("Inloggen", not "Log hier eenvoudig in!").
donts: Don't introduce felle sportkleuren, scoreboard-chrome, or uitroeptekens.
Don't add hero-metric blocks, fabricated testimonials, or 'vertrouwd door X clubs' claims.
Don't add a box-shadow to any in-flow surface (cards, buttons, nav). Reserve shadow-lg for the portaled overlay layer only.
Don't add an uppercase tracked eyebrow above any section heading.
Don't invent a second brand typeface. Inter carries every weight the system needs.
Don't use border-left/border-right as a colored accent stripe on cards or callouts.
